positive: A stylized, highly detailed illustration of a bioluminescent cosmic forest at night. The palette should contrast deep indigo blues, royal purples, and vivid neon cyan with pops of warm gold light. Utilize strong, clean linework, psychedelic symmetry, and volumetric, ethereal glowing elements. The style should evoke a blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and futuristic vaporwave geometry, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Focus on clean edges and high contrast silhouette. Full body shot of the celestial landscape.
